calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default prove up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18:35 a.m. and 10:48:38 a.m.

Plaintiff Mesa Underwriters Speciality Insurance Company represented by David Brand, Esq., via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Cloud of Goods, Inc. a Corporation not appearing.

ROBERT ALLAN FIKE (Underwriter Dept.), DEDRA JOHNSON (Billing Dept.), and JACKIE JASKOT (Conducted Audit) are placed under oath.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents case summary and an offer of proof.

Court examines ROBERT ALLAN FIKE.
Court examines DEDRA JOHNSON
Court examines JACKIE JASKOT

The matter is submitted.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court reduces damages to the sum of $37,980.00.
Counsel for Plaintiff calcuates interest at 10%.

COURT FINDS:

1. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on May-12-2022
2. Default against Defendant Cloud of Goods, Inc. a Corporation entered on Apr-25-2022
3. Plaintiff has proven each element of its camplaint for failure to pay insurance premiums by the documents filed and statements presented by counsel and its witnesses.
4. The Court has reviewed the Declaration of Terrance J. Cox and confirmed that facts stated in it's declaration are true and correct.

The Court determines that the amount of interest owed from Jul-04-2021 thru Nov-17-2022 at 10% equal the sum of $5,215.41.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Mesa Underwriters Specialty Insurance Company, and against Defendant Cloud of Goods, Inc., a Corporation, as follows:

Damages: $37,980.00
Prejudgment Interest: $5,215.41
Costs: $544.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $43,739.41

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
